name: The Carrion Virus
text: You cannot ready Organic Webbing upgrades. When Revealed: Exhaust each of your Organic Webbing upgrades. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Kaine → remove this obligation from the game.

name: The Jackal's Obsession
text: “Through my perfected cloning techniques, I, THE JACKAL, will bring Gwen Stacy back to life.” -Miles Warren, the Jackal When Revealed: Place 1[per_hero] threat here. [crisis]

name: Jackal
text: Quickstrike. When Defeated: Confuse your identity. Search the encounter deck and set-aside area for the Clone Saga environment and put it into play. (Scarlet Spider's nemesis minion.)

name: Clone Saga
text:
Surge. Jackal gains surge.
The unique rule does not apply to characters in play.
Each [[clone ]]minion gains each [[trait ]]of the identity engaged with them.

name: Clone
text: Forced Interrupt: When a character other than your identity attacks Clone, discard the top card of your deck. If that card's printed cost is odd, resolve that attack against your identity instead.

flavor: “The die is cast!”
name: Peter Parker's Conciousness
text: Forced Response: After an ally you control leaves play, discard the top 8 cards of your deck. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [mental][mental] resources and read this card's flavor text → remove this card from the game.

name: Limitless Power
text: Supernova has been imprisoned by the Superior Spider-Man for months. Now she's back with a vengeance and incredible power. Supernova gets +1 ATK and +1 THW. Supernova cannot be defeated. [acceleration]

flavor: “Spider-Man will pay for what he did to me!”
name: Supernova
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Supernova activates against you, deal 1 damage to each character you control and place 1 threat on each scheme. (Superior Spider-Man's nemesis minion.)

name: Explosion of Power
text: When Revealed: Take 4 indirect damage. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an [energy] resource. Add that card to your hand. [star] Boost: Take 1 indirect damage.

name: Dynamo Assault
text: Surge. When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck and each player deck.

name: Sonic Vulnerability
text: Flip Symbiotic Bond to its [[bonded ]]side. Treat the printed text box of Symbiotic Bond as if it were blank. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Eddie Brock and take 1 damage → discard this obligation.

name: Fire Vulnerability
text:
If Symbiotic Bond is [[bonded]], take 2 indirect damage. Discard this obligation.
If Symbiotic Bond is attached to an ally, deal 3 damage to that ally. Discard this obligation.

name: Maximum Carnage
text: Carnage and his lover Shriek are committing a murder spree across Manhattan. Venom and Spider-Man reluctantly agree to work together to stop his rampage. Hinder 2[per_hero]. Assault. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to each hero. [crisis]

name: Carnage
text: Villainous. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Carnage would scheme against you, he attacks an ally you control instead, if able. (Venom's nemesis minion.) “I'M GOING TO PAINT THE TOWN RED!!!!”

name: Shriek
text: Villainous. Patrol. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Shriek attacks, if Carnage is in play, give her 1 additional boost card for this activation. “My sonic scream didn't hurt you, did it? I get angry when someone's hurting my man...”

name: Sonic Boom
text: When Revealed: Either spend [energy][mental][physical] resources or exhaust each character you control. [star] Boost: If this activation deals damage to you, exhaust your hero.

name: Paint the Town Red
text: Attach to Carnage. If you cannot, attach to a minion. Forced Interrupt: After attached minion attacks you, deal 1 damage to each character you control. [star] Boost: Deal 1 damage to each character you control.

flavor: “I can liquefy your brains with these vibrations!”
name: Shocker
text: Steady. When Defeated: Remove 5 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

flavor: “I can liquefy your bones with these vibrations!”
name: Shocker
text: Steady. In expert mode, Shocker gains stalwart. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to each hero. Remove 10 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

name: Shock Party
text: Contents: Shocker (A). (Shocker (B) instead for expert mode.) Shocker, City in Chaos, Power Drain II, and Standard III encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Crime Wave). Setup: Search the encounter deck for The Long Night side scheme and reveal it. Remove each obligation card in the encounter deck from the game.

flavor: New York City has lost power, a blackout. Shocker is lighting up Times Square, claiming responsibility and looking for a fight.
name: Shock Party
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment and reveal it.

name: Look Who Finally Showed
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Rhino minion and put him into play engaged with the first player. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Grand Larceny side scheme and reveal it. (Shuffle.)

flavor: “We're getting paid to rob a bank? Hahaha, that's a win-win! My two favorite things - breakin...and takin!”
name: Look Who Finally Showed
text: Forced Response: After Shocker or Rhino is defeated, remove 1[per_hero] threat from this scheme.

flavor: Shocker puts out the call for all of New York's super villains to aid him in killing the heroes, promising them a cut of his pay.
name: The Gang's All Here
text: When Revealed: In player order, each player not engaged with unique minion ([unique]) searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a unique minion ([unique]) and reveals it.

flavor: Shocker has new tech and powerful allies. Their only goal - create chaos and terror.
name: The Gang's All Here
text: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets gains permanent. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets
text: Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: AfterShocker attacks and damages you, discard a card from your hand. Hero Action: Spend [mental][physical] resources and remove a stunned or confused status card from Shocker → discard Vibro-Shock Gauntlets. [star]Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I need the money for my Daughter! Kingpin better pay up..." -Sandman
name: Sandman
text: Toughness. [star] Forced Response: After Sandman attacks or engages you, discard the top 6 cards of the encounter deck.

flavor: "Sup Spiders? Ready for pain?" -Scorpion
name: Scorpion
text: Forced Response (Hero): After Scorpion engages you, stun your hero.

flavor: "I trust that the kingpin will pay. I trust you less, Shocker..." -Vulture
name: Vulture
text: Quickstrike. Forced Response: After Vulture engages you, discard 1 random card from your hand unless your identity has the [[aerial ]] trait.

name: Feedback
text: When Revealed: Stun your identity and Shocker. Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.

name: Ionic Boots
text: Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: After Shocker attacks and damages you, place 2 threat on the main scheme. Hero Action: Spend [energy][mental][physical] resources → discard this card.

flavor: Criminals in New York are on a a crime spree, robbing every business they come across.
name: Grand Larceny
text: Threat cannot be removed from The Long Night. Hero Response (thwart): After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 5 threat from Grand Larceny. [crisis]

name: The Getaway
text: When Revealed: Choose one: • Heal 3 damage from Shocker. Shocker schemes. • If the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment is not in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for it and reveal it.

name: The Check Cleared
text: Surge. When Revealed: Place threat on The Long Night equal to the combined SCH of each [[criminal ]]enemy in play.

flavor: “I bet you're shocked to see me.”
name: Get Shocked!
text: When Revealed: Stun your identity. Deal 1 damage to each hero. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.

name: The Long Night
text: Permanent. Hinder 15[per_hero]. The players cannot win unless they survive the night. Reponse: After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 2 threat from The Long Night. Forced Interrupt: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, the players survive the night and win the game.

name: Power Drain
text: When Defeated: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Each player must choose and discard 1 resource of any type from their hand for each boost icon discarded this way. [acceleration]

name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks you, discard 1 card from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Electromagnetic Pulse
text: When Revealed: Discard 7 cards from the encounter deck. If an Electro minion was discarded this way, put that minion into play engaged with you. If Electro was not discarded this way, this card gains surge. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Lightning Bolt
text: When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Shock Therapy
text: When Revealed: Discard 1[per_hero] cards from the encounter deck. The villain heals 1 damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Electro
text: [star] Electro gets +1 hit point for each [energy] resource attached to her. [star] Forced Response: After Electro engages you or activates against you, choose 1 card from your hand with a printed [energy] resource and attach it to her.

flavor: "You think that's bad? You just wait!"
name: Electro
text: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

name: Electro
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a copy of A.I.M. Scientist is discarded. Put it into play engaged with the first player. Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

name: Electro
text: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery with 1 or more boost icons is discarded. Then, discard an equal number of cards from the top of your deck.

flavor: Electro has teamed up with A.I.M. to help boost his already deadly electricity abilities. With access to dark matter energy, pure electricity form, and even electric clones of himself, he's no joke anymore.
name: Energized!
text: Contents: Electro (I) and Electro (II). (Electro (II) and Electro (III) instead for expert.) Electro, Power Drain, and Standard encounter sets. 1 modular encounter set (Sinister Assault). Setup: Find the Electricty Clones and Grounded environments and put them into play. Advance to stage 1B.

name: Energized!
text: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase ends, heal 1 damage from the villain for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: "I saw him do that in a video game once!" -Deadpool
name: Electricity Clones
text: Permanent. Electro ignores the unique rule. (Multiple copies of Electro can be in play, but "Forced Response" abilities on a copy of Electro can still only be triggered by that particular copy.)

name: Grounded
text: Permanent. While the total cost of all upgrades and supports in play is less than 10[per_hero], the villain cannot be defeated. Forced Response: After the villain is defeated, remove this card from the game [arrow] each player draws 2 cards.

name: Greased Lightning
text: Attach to the villain. The attached villain gets +1 Scheme. Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place an [acceleration] token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck → discard this card.

flavor: "I'm a living force of nature!"—Electro
name: Lightning Speed
text: Attach to the villain. Forced Response: After a copy of Electro enters play, place an acceleration token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck [acceleration] discard this card.

name: A.I.M. Scientist
text: When Defeated: Find the Dark Matter Conversion side scheme and reveal it. [star] Boost: Place an acceleration token on an ally.

flavor: "Max, there's nothing you can do that'd shock me!"
name: Black Cat
text: [star] Forced Response: After Black Cat engages you or schemes, discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Deal each card with a star icon ([star]) discarded this way to yourself as a facedown encounter card.

flavor: "Drop something, pal?!" —Electro
name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

flavor: "Drop something, pal?!" —Electro
name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

flavor: "Tell me this is gonna work..." -Electro
name: Accelerated Plans
text: Forced Response: After this side scheme enters play, place 2 threat here for each acceleration icon and token in play.

flavor: "That Quantum Field Generator is no joke. It'll let Electro harness the power of Dark Matter, too." -Spider-Man
name: Dark Matter Conversion
text: The villain gets +2 ATK and gains retaliate 1. When Revealed: Place 1 additional threat here for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play.

flavor:
"Ever heard lightning never strikes twice? All lies."
—Electro
name: Charging
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. If that minion is Electro, put it into play and it gains quickstrike. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

name: High Voltage
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. When Revealed (Hero): Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. [star] Boost: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck.

flavor: "Time to get a little extra juice!" —Electro
name: Recharging
text: When Revealed: Heal 3 damage from each copy of Electro in play. If 3 or fewer damage was healed this way, this card gains surge.

flavor: "...ouch." —Spider-Man
name: Shocked
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to the number of cards in your hand. If 3 or fewer cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge.

name: The Lizard
text: Each [[reptilian ]]enemy gest +1 ATK for each formula counter here. Forced Interrupt: When the Lizard would be defeated, instead: discard each attachment from him, remove each formula counter from here, place 1[per_hero] sanity counters on Lizard Brain, and flip card.

name: Curt Connors
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Curt Connors would attack, remove 1 sanity counter from Lizard Brain instead. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Curt Connors schemes, this activation removes threat instead of placing it. After this activation, remove 1 sanity counter from Lizard Brain.

name: Chasing Down The Lizard
text: After tampering by the Kingpin and A.I.M., the Lizard is rampaging through the city! Contents: The Lizard (A). The Lizard and Standard encounter sets. Two modular encounter sets (City Sewers and Down to Earth). Setup: Reveal the Lizard Brain attachment. Place 1 formula counter on The Lizard. In expert mode, place 1 additional formula counter on The Lizard.

name: Chasing Down The Lizard
text: Forced Interrupt: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, advance to stage 2A (the players win by advancing). If Curt Connors is in play, remove all sanity counters from Lizard Brain, and each player draws 1 card for each sanity counter removed this way. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: The Cure
text: The heroes have lured the Lizard back to his lab. Can they cobble together a cure for Connors? When Revealed: Place 1 formula counter on The Lizard. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Regenerative Research and reveal it. Place 2[per_hero] threat on Regenerative Research.

name: The Cure
text: Alter-Ego Action: If you control a [[genius ]]character, spend [mental][mental] resources → remove 4 threat from here. (Limit once per round per player). If this stage is completed, the players lose the game. If there is no threat here and the Lizard is not in play, the players win the game.

name: Lizard Brain
text: Permanent. In expert mode, each minion gains the [[reptilian ]]trait. [star] Forced Response: After the last sanity counter is removed from here, flip Curt Connors, then set The Lizard's hit point dial to his printed hit points.

name: Viper Fangs
text: Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Interrupt: When attached villain attacks, the attack gains piercing. If that attack deals damage to an identity, place 1 threat on the main scheme. [star] Boost: Attach this card to The Lizard.

name: Reptilian Regeneration
text: Attach to the [[reptilian ]]enemy with the highest printed hit points without another Reptilian Regeneration attached. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, heal 1[per_hero] damage from attached enemy.

name: Super Reptile
text: Attach to The Lizard. Otherwise, Super Reptile gains surge. Attached villain gains the [[brute ]]trait. [star] Boost: Attach this card to The Lizard.

name: Experimental Injection
text:
Attach to a minion without the [[reptilian ]]trait. Otherwise, attach to the minion with the least remaining hit points. If you cannot, this card gains surge.
Attached minion gains the [[reptilian ]]trait and gets +4 hit points.

name: Lizardmen
text: Toughness. [star] Boost: Give the villain a tough status card.

name: Giant Alligator
text: Quickstrike. Patrol. When Revealed: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. “Dungeon boss: most ginormous alligator ever.” -Ms. Marvel

name: Princess Python
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Experimental Injection and attach it to Princess Python. Forced Response: After Princess Python attacks you, take 2 indirect damage.

name: Regenerative Research
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, heal 1 damage from each [[reptilian ]]enemy. [hazard] “Let the warm-blooded weaklings who inherited the earth through the cosmic fluke _ of a meteor crash beware!”

name: Scaly Setback
text: The Lizard gets +10 hit points. [crisis] [star] Boost: If the villain is attacking, this attack gains overkill.

name: Martha and Billy
text: Surge. When Revealed: Place 1 sanity counter on Lizard Brain. “Curtis Connors was a good husband, a good father! His son, Billy, adored him... and so did I!” — Martha Connors

name: In Cold Blood
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): If The Lizard is in play, discard 1 card at random from your hand. When Revealed (Hero): The Lizard attacks you. You cannot play events until after that attack resolves. If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.

name: Experimental Sewer Lair
text: Each enemy gains retaliate 1.

name: Stegron
text: [star] Boost: Give the villain a tough status card. Put this minion into play engaged with you. “STEGRON, THE DINOSAUR MAN, will bring a new world of dinosaurs - born in blood and terror!”

name: Trapped in the Pipes
text: Attach to your identity. Negate 1. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 1 card.) [star] Forced Response: After you change form, discard this card. [star] Boost: You are confused.

name: Ceiling Collapse
text: Negate 2. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 2 cards.) When Revealed: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck. [star] Boost: Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card.

name: We're Totally Lost
text: Negate 1. (After this card is revealed or turned faceup during an enemy activation, if any of its effects are canceled, the revealing player draws 1 card.) When Revealed: You are confused. If you are already confused, choose and discard 1 card you control.

name: Vulture
text: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

name: Vulture
text: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Feather Daggers and reveal it. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

name: Vulture
text: Vulture cannot be attacked during the player phase unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged. When Revealed: Deal each player an encounter card. “It's only a matter of time before I crush you!”

name: Surveillance Pigeons
text: Contents: Vulture (I) and Vulture (II). (Vulture (II) and Vulture (III) for expert mode.) Vulture and Standard III encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: A.I.M. Abduction). Setup: Each player puts a Wingsuit upgrade into play under their control. Put each copy of Aerial Advantage into play.

name: Surveillance Pigeons
text: [[bird. ]]Forced Interrupt: When you would remove any amount of threat from this scheme, remove 3 pigeon counters from here instead. Interrupt: When you would discard a random card from your hand, you may place 2 pigeon counters here instead. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: The Vulture's Plans
text: When Revealed: Discard 1 card at random from each player's hand. Place 1 threat on the main scheme for each different resource type discarded this way. "Spider-Man will pay for interfering with my plans!" —The Vulture

name: Sweeping Swoop
text: Surge. When Revealed: Stun your hero. __________________________________ [star] Boost: If this activation deals damage to a friendly character, stun that character.

name: Falling
text: Peril. When Revealed: Choose: • Exhaust an [[aerial ]]card you control. • Discard 3 cards from your hand at random. • Take 5 damage.

name: Vulturion
text: Quickstrike. Vulnerable. When Defeated: Discard 1 card at random from the engaged player's hand. [star] Boost: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

name: Fisk Helicopter
text: Patrol. Steady. Vulnerable. When Defeated: Choose: • Spend 2 resources of the same type. • Place 2 threat on a scheme. The defeating player takes 2 indirect damage.

name: Aggressive Surveillance
text: Characters with the [[aerial ]]trait remove 1 additional threat when thwarting this scheme. When Defeated: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Fisk Helicopter minion and reveal it. [amplify][crisis]

name: Highway Robbery
text: When Revealed: Each player places a random card from their hand facedown here. When Defeated: Return each facedown card here to its owner's hand. [acceleration]

name: Aerial Dogfight
text:
Hinder 2[per_hero].
Reduce the damage each [[aerial ]]character takes from each attack by 2 unless the attacker or attack has the [[aerial ]]trait, or the attack has ranged.
 [hazard]

name: Aerial Advantage
text: Surge. Attach to the Vulture. Forced Interrupt: When any amount of damage would be dealt to Vulture, discard Aerial Advantage instead. Place 1 pigeon counter on the main scheme. “My wings give me the ultimate high ground!”

name: Anti-Gravitational Harness
text: Attach to your identity. Attached character gains the [[aerial ]]trait. Alter-Ego Action: Discard a card from your hand and place 2 pigeon counters on the main scheme → discard this card. [hazard]

name: Feather Daggers
text: Attach to Vulture. [star] Vulture's attacks gain piercing and ranged. Hero Response: After Vulture attacks you, discard Feather Daggers → Vulture activates against you. “Guess Vulture had some upgrades of his own!” -Spider-Man

name: Aviator Goggles
text: Attach to Vulture and place 2 pigeon counters on the main scheme. Vulture gains steady. Hero Response: After you attack and damage Vulture, spend an [energy] resource → discard Aviator Goggles.

name: Wingsuit
text: Setup. Permanent. Hero Interrupt: When you play an ally or event card, exhaust Wingsuit → that card gains the [[aerial ]]trait until the end of the phase.

name: Kingpin
text: Toughness. Steady. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Kingpin's Suit and reveal it. “You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

name: Kingpin
text: Toughness. Steady. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Kingpin's Suit and Kingpin's Cane attachments and attach them to Kingpin.“You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

name: Kingpin
text: Toughness. Stalwart. When Revealed: Each player puts the top card of their deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Kingpin's Suit and reveal it. “You embarassed me in front of Vanessa.”

name: Shadow of the Kingpin
text: Wilson Fisk is the Kingpin, the feared crime lord of New York City. Thanks to media manipulation from A.I.M., he is also the mayor of New York City. Contents: Kingpin and Standard III encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Crime Wave). Setup: Find Fisk Tower and put it into play. Place 1[per_hero] counters on Pursued by the Past.

name: Shadow of the Kingpin
text: Deep Pockets — Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, the first player places 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game. “It's Hard To Come To Terms With Our Violent Nature.” -Mayor Wilson Fisk

name: Fisk Tower
text: Each facedown [[corrupt ]]side scheme has starting threat equal to the villain's stage number. Forced Response: After step one of the villain phase, heal 1 damage from Kingpin and Kingpin's Suit for each [[corrupt ]]side scheme in play.

name: King's Gambit
text: When Revealed: Put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Kingpin schemes. [star] Boost: Discard 1 card from the top of the encounter deck for each pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past.

name: Long Live the King
text: When Revealed: Put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Place 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. “I won't stand for it.”

name: Controlling the Narrative
text:
Incite 1.
Attach to the non-permanent side scheme with the most remaining threat without another copy of Controlling the Narrative attached. If you cannot, this card gains surge.
Attached scheme gains the [acceleration][crisis] icons.

name: Kingpin's Suit
text: Attach to Kingpin. Forced Interrupt: When any amount of damage would be dealt to Kingpin, place it here instead. Then, if there is at least 10 damage here, discard Kingpin's Suit. [star] Boost: Attach Kingpin's Suit to Kingpin.

name: Kingpin's Cane
text: Attach to Kingpin. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Kingpin initiates an attack against you, put the top card of your deck into play facedown as a [[corrupt ]]side scheme. Hero Action: Spend [physical][physical][physical] resources → discard this card. [star] Boost: After this activation, attach this card to Kingpin.

name: Typhoid Mary
text: [star] Typhoid Mary's attacks deal indirect damage. When Revealed: Take 1 indirect damage for each pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. “And the thing is... I didn't even eat the cheese.”

name: Lady Bullseye
text: Quickstrike. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) When Defeated: Place 2 pursuit counters on Pursued by the Past. “The first time I killed a man, all I felt was... impatience to do it again.”

name: Devil's Reign
text: [[corrupt. ]]Wilson Fisk's hubris as mayor of New York has cast the city in the waiting arms of a cadre of dangerous and deadly super villains! [hazard][hazard]

name: “Legitimate Business”
text: [[corrupt. ]]The Kingpin. On paper he was a shadow. A businessman. He was careful not to leave a trail... Hinder 1[per_hero]. When Defeated: The first player discards cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded and reveals that card. [amplify]

name: FBI Investigation
text: Forced Response: After a card you control defeats a side scheme, place 1 clue counter here. Then, if there are at least 3 clue counters here, discard this card and place 1 pursuit counter on Pursued by the Past. [acceleration]

name: Prey for Mercy
text: “We are going to fight, Kaine. One predator against another. And one of us will die.” -Kraven the Hunter Threat cannot be removed from this scheme while Kraven the Hunter is in play. (Prey for Mercy is a nemesis side scheme.) [hazard]

name: Kraven the Hunter
text: Steady. Villainous. [star] Forced Response: After Kraven the Hunter attacks and damages you, exhaust 1 upgrade or support you control. (Kraven the Hunter is a nemesis minion.) “Let the hunt... begin!”

name: Mancatcher Net
text: When Revealed: Choose and discard the lowest-cost support or upgrade you control. Stun your identity. “I'll be head to heels in blood tonight...” -Kraven the Hunter

name: Tiger
text: Quickstrike. [star] Tiger's attacks gain piercing. “ROAR!” [star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it gains piercing.

name: Pit Trap
text: Attach to your identity and take 1 damage. Forced Interrupt: When attached character would ready, discard this card instead. [star] Boost: Attach this card to your identity.

name: Escaped Convict
text: Surge. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.)

name: Hired Gun
text: Guard. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.)

name: Crime Pays
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a [[criminal ]]minion and put it into play engaged with you. (Shuffle.) If no minion was put into play this way, this card gains surge. [acceleration]

name: Honor Among Thieves
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[criminal ]]minion is discarded. Reveal that minion, then give that minion a tough status card and the villain 1 facedown boost card.

name: “Vote for Fisk”
text: Standard Mode Only. [star] Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place 2 threat on the scheme with the lowest amount of threat. “We can no longer rely on Superhumans in New York City. The Avengers, the X-Men, and least of all, The Spiders.”

name: “Vote for Fisk”
text: Expert Mode Only. [star] Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place 2 threat on the scheme with the lowest amount of threat. [acceleration][hazard]

name: Bodyguard
text: Search the encounter deck for the minion with the highest printed hit points and put it into play with you with Bodyguard attached to it. Attached minion gains the [[elite ]]trait, guard, and gets +2 hit points. Forced Interrupt: When attached minion is defeated, shuffle it into the encounter deck from the encounter discard pile. “I get paid by the punch.”

name: “He's Mine!”
text: When Revealed: If the Bodyguard attachment is not in play, discard each non-[[elite]] minion engaged with you. Place 1 threat on the main scheme for each minion discarded this way. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Bodyguard attachment and reveal it. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

name: Bodyguard
text: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.) [star] Boost: Choose to give the villain a tough status card or heal 4 damage from the villain. If you cannot, put this card into play engaged with you.

name: Multiverse Recruit
text: Attached minion ignores the unique rule and gains Victory 0. When Revealed: Search your collection for a nemesis minion and put it into play engaged with you with Multiverse Recruit attached. (Limit once per minion per campaign.) “This round goes to you fair spider. But you shall hear again from the Six Men of Sinestry.”

name: The Great Web
text: Setup. Surge. The unique rule does not apply to each [[web-warrior]] character and each card with “Spider” in its title. “We learn from our mistakes, Peter. But new challenges will arise, and when they do... the Web-Warriors will be there to meet them.”

name: Green Goblin
text: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. Shuffle each [[tech ]]attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. “Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha hahahaha haha!” -Green Goblin

name: Hobgoblin
text: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. Shuffle each [[tech ]]attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. “Hahahahahahahaahaaaaaha!”

name: Great Web Strand
text: Setup. Hero Response: After you change form, discard Great Web Strand → search your deck and discard pile for a [[web-warrior]] ally or an ally with “Spider” in its title and add it to your hand.

name: Spider-Girl
text: Response: After Spider-Girl enters play or leaves play, choose: • Ready your hero. • Heal 1 damage from your alter-ego.

name: Spider-UK
text: Toughness. Response: After Spider-UK enters play, give another [[web-warrior]] character a tough status card. If you cannot, discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an ally and add it to your hand. “british quote here!”

name: Great Web Warrior
text: Setup. You gain the [[web-warrior]] trait. You get +2 hit points. The portal opens to reveal the dimension designated Earth-001.

name: Earth-001
text: Setup. Permanent. You may include [[web-warrior]] allies from any aspect in your deck during deckbuilding. “So, Karn. How've you been? You're not feeling...hungry or anything, are you?” -Anya

name: Web-Warriors
text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 [[team ]]card per player. Each of your [[web-warrior]] allies gets +1 hit point and +1 ATK. “Battleplan Normandy! Take it to 'em!” -Spider-UK

name: Spider-Man Noir
text: Response: After Spider-Man Noir leaves play, heal 4 damage from your identity. “Wherever I go the wind follows, and the wind... smells like rain.”

name: Spider-Man
text: Response: After Spider-Man leaves play, remove 4 threat from a scheme. "Being Spider-Man is so easy!"

name: Arana
text: Response: After Arana leaves play, deal 5 damage to an enemy.

name: Master Weaver
text: Each [[web-warrior]] ally gets +1 hit point for each boost icon ([boost]) tucked under them. Response: After a [[web-warrior]] ally enters play, tuck the top card of the encounter deck under that ally.

name: Radioactive Spider
text: Setup. Action: Discard Radioactive Spider → deal 1 damage to your identity. You get +2 hand size until the end of the phase.

name: Venom Blast
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and an Aggression card.)

name: Wallcrawl
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. If this removes the last threat from that scheme, draw 2 cards. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Justice card.)

name: Spider-Healing Factor
text: You get +3 hit points. Response: After your turn begins, exhaust Spider-Healing Factor → heal 1 damage from your identity. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card an a Pool card.)

name: Proportionate Strength and Speed
text: You get +3 hit points and your hero gets +1 DEF and +1 ATK. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Protection card.)

name: Doppelganger
text: Response: After Doppelganger leaves play, search your deck and discard pile for a [[superpower ]]card and add it to your hand. (This card is both a Web of Deceit Campaign Reward card and a Leadership card.)

name: Dynamo
text: Uses (3 energy counters). Response: After you play a [[superpower ]]card, remove 1 energy counter from Dynamo → stun an enemy and deal 2 damage to it.

name: Camouflage
text: Uses (3 energy counters). Response: After you play a [[superpower ]]card, remove 1 energy counter from Camouflage→ confuse an enemy and give your identity a tough status card.

name: Spider-Tingle
text: Setup. Interrupt: When you reveal a treachery, discard Spider-Tingle → cancel the “When Revealed” effects of that treachery. “It's his Spider-Sense!”

name: Spider-Sense
text: Hero Interrupt: When the villain initiates an attack against you, draw 1 card. “Thanks Spidey-Sense!”

name: Clairvoyant Sight
text: Setup. Permanent. You gain the [[psionic ]]trait. “The threads of destiny are never still. I see where they lead… if you dare to follow.” -Madame Web.

name: Sensing Trouble
text: Hero Action (thwart): Ready your identity → remove 3 threat from a scheme. “Trouble nearby, I better investigate!”

name: Team Spider-Sense
text: Alliance. Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects. Each player draws 1 card.

name: Arachno-Telepathy
text: Action (thwart): Exhaust Arachno-Telepathy, and discard 1 card from the encounter deck → remove 1 threat from a scheme for each icon ([boost] or [star]) discarded this way. “We can eat them, right? Asking for a friend.” —Spiders-Man

name: Backflip
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When your hero would take any amount of damage from an enemy attack, prevent all of that damage. “Whoops!” - Silk

name: See the Future
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: Each player draws 2 cards. Until the end of the round, play with the top card of the encounter deck faceup. “New skeins of being sewn....” -Julia Carpenter, Madame Web

name: Madame Web
text: Each [[psionic ]]character you control gains the [[web-warrior]] trait. Alter-Ego Action (thwart): Exhaust Madame Web → for each [[web-warrior]] card you control, choose a scheme and remove 1 threat from it.

name: Web-Shooter
text: Setup. Uses (3 web counters.) Hero Resource: Exhaust Web-Shooter and remove 1 web counter from it → generate a [wild] resource.

name: Quick Reload
text: Hero Action: Choose two of the following (you may choose the same option twice): • Ready a [[tech ]]card you control. • Place 1 all-purpose counter on a [[tech ]]upgrade you control. “I need to whip up a new batch of web fluid soon...” - Spider-Man

name: Spider-Bots
text: Uses (4 bot counters). Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust Spider-Bots and remove 1 bot counter from here → remove threat from a scheme equal to the total number of printed [mental] and [wild] resources in your hand.

name: Bag Head
text: Victory 1. Action: Add Bag Head to the victory display→ change to hero form. Draw up to your hand size.

flavor: “I'm a symbol of hope... At the very least, I can look cool doing it.” — Spider-Man, India
name: The Power of Web
Spider-Mobile
text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each [[web-warrior]] card you control. Hero Response: After you defend against an attack, exhaust Spider-Mobile → ready your identity.

name: Spider-Boy
text: Response: After Spider-Boy enters play or leaves play, remove 1 threat from a scheme. "No need to applaud. Well...maybe some applause would be nice." —Spider-Boy

name: Web Swing!
text: Hero Action: Ready your hero. Your identity gets +1 to each of its basic powers until the end of the round. “I need to whip up a new batch of web fluid soon...” - Spider-Man

name: Webbed
text: Attach to an enemy. Attached enemy loses steady and stalwart. Forced Interrupt: When an enemy would activate, discard Webbed instead.

name: Power Outage
text: Contents: Electro (I) and Electro (II). (Electro (II) and Electro (III) instead for expert mode.) Electro, Power Drain II, and Standard encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended A.I.M. Science). Setup: Put the Electricity Clones and Grounded environments into play.

flavor: Electro teams up with his girlfriend, A.I.M., Kingpin, and his electro-clones to charge up more than ever before! Can the Spiders stop him?
name: Power Outage
text: [star] Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, heal 1 damage from the villain for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play.

flavor: The Electros are on the verge of unlimited power, thanks to the science of A.I.M. and the backing of the Kingpin...
name: Power Surge
text: When Revealed: Exhaust each friendly [[TECH]] support and upgrade. Each player discards cards from the encounter deck until they discard an [[A.I.M.]] minion, then reveals that minion. Each player searches their deck and discard pile for a card with a printed [energy] resource and adds it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

flavor: Electro is overloading the grid!
name: Power Surge
text: * Forced Response: After you resolve an Electro treachery, remove that treachery from the game. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: A.i.m. Scientist
text: Vulnerable. When Defeated: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Dark Matter Conversion side scheme and reveal it.
